title: disperis cardiophora
intro: Disperis cardiophora, also known as the heart-leaved disperis, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Disperis cardiophora include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Disperis cardiophora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements in the form of capsules or tablets.
